# OpenDDIL Projector ‚Äî LLM Context

This repository (`openddil-projector`) houses the Kafka ‚Üí Postgres projector
for OpenDDIL, introduced in Phase 4a.

## Purpose

A single generic service that consumes pipeline Kafka topics and UPSERTs
them into Postgres read-model tables. ElectricSQL exposes those tables as
Shapes to the UI. This is the ONLY Kafka‚ÜíPostgres path; there is no
per-topic projector and no Faust HTTP endpoint.

One service, many subscriptions. Adding a new topic to the UI is a YAML
mapping entry + a handler, not a new service.

## Architecture (ADR-0019)

```
Kafka topic ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚ñ∫ decoder ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚ñ∫ handler (field map) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚ñ∫ Postgres UPSERT ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚ñ∫ ElectricSQL Shape ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚ñ∫ UI
```

The projector is a DUMB PIPE. It has no business logic. Severity
computation, discrepancy analysis, and fusion all happen upstream.

## Key Files

- `src/main.py` ‚Äî entrypoint. One consumer task per configured topic;
  Prometheus metrics on :8084; SIGHUP reloads config.
- `src/config/projector_config.yaml` ‚Äî topic‚Üítable mapping, hot-reloadable.
- `src/handlers/base.py` ‚Äî Handler interface: `handle(key, decoded) -> Upsert`.
- `src/handlers/{cm_state,logistics_status,telemetry_latest,tactical_events,telemetry_windows}.py`
  ‚Äî one per topic; pure field-mapping functions.
- `src/decoders/proto.py` ‚Äî protobuf decoders + schema-drift tolerance.
- `src/decoders/cloudevents.py` ‚Äî CloudEvents JSON decoder for tactical-events.
- `src/persistence/postgres.py` ‚Äî asyncpg pool + UPSERT/INSERT/prune helpers.

## Topic ‚Üí Table Mapping

| Topic | Table | Mode | Decode as |
|-------|-------|------|-----------|
| asset-cm-state | asset_cm_state | upsert | AsMaintainedConfiguration |
| asset-logistics-status | asset_logistics_status | upsert | AssetLogisticsStatusUpdate |
| telemetry-latest-state | telemetry_latest_state | upsert | EntityTelemetryEvent |
| tactical-events | tactical_events | append | CloudEvents JSON |
| asset-telemetry-windows | asset_telemetry_windows | upsert | WindowedTelemetry |

## Rules

- At-least-once: commit Kafka offset only after the Postgres write succeeds.
- Schema-drift tolerant: a bad message is logged and skipped, never fatal.
- Backpressure: on Postgres-down, retry with backoff; do not crash, do not drop.
- Rate limiting: >N updates/sec for one asset_id are coalesced in a small
  per-asset buffer before UPSERT.
- Append-only retention: `tactical_events` rows older than `retention_hours`
  are pruned hourly by a background task.
- Never write `audit_log` ‚Äî HQ-only, not in the Electric publication.

## Docker Compose

When consumed by openddil-demo:
- Base `docker-compose.yml` references `image: ghcr.io/edgy-solutions/openddil/projector:latest`.
- `docker-compose.override.yml` has the `build:` block + the
  `openddil-contracts/gen/python` mount for development.
- NEVER add a `build:` to the base compose. Publish a new image first.
